title: Things while in Vietnam — 2022 trip route prep
html:
TL;DR

  • Pre-trip Vietnam route plan (July 2022): Ha Giang Bike Tour, Ha Long Bay (Poem Mountain), Hoi An Lanterns, Sapa, Phong Nha caves, Nha Trang, Ho Chi Minh / Saigon.
  • Mixed in: Vietnam visa todo (✅), call snap, basement-cleaning chores, CS161B coursework, washing the dog lola.
  • Confirms first major solo-international trip was Vietnam summer 2022, predating the china chapter (Sep 2024) by 2 years.
  • Closes with "Stream east / Cracked streams" — sports-streaming reminders for road logistics.
  • The basement-stain-couches list is the grants pass or family-house chores backdrop — Yahir is at home prepping for the trip.

Key quotes

"Ha Giang Bike Tour / Ha Long Bay / -Poem Mountain / Hoi An Lanterns / Sapa / phong nha (where crazy caves are)"

"wash Lola"

"begin and complete many CS161B assignments"

Why it matters in the graph

  • vietnam entity already exists (likely from earlier ingest). This adds 2nd+ mention with route specificity.
  • Establishes 2022 = pre-China, pre-Sam, pre-Brotein — Vietnam was the first major solo trip.
  • The CS161B reference dates the OSU coursework — Data Structures equivalent likely. Pairs with the CS-degree arc on 2025 10 20 quality resume.

Open questions

  • Who did he go to Vietnam with (if anyone)?
  • Did he complete the route as planned, or improvise?
  • Was the Vietnam trip scholarship-funded? (JCEF / Ford?)

Wikilinks

vietnam · osu · grants pass or · lola · yahir family
